failure_reason: Answered the fear/holding-back question by moving beyond structure into source-backed data. Added /api/ideas/source-index as a native kernel-router route that reads ideas/INDEX.md directly and returns super_idea_count=17, index_bytes=3512, source_status=read, and X-Form-Router:native-kernel. Baked production-routes.fk and ideas/ into the kernel-router image so the route is deployable when ROUTES_FILE selects production routes. Mutable DB-backed /api/ideas/count remains fan-out because graph-node storage is not yet exposed through a Form carrier.
